endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}/providers/Microsoft.Security/adaptiveNetworkHardenings
endpoints.description: Gets a list of Adaptive Network Hardenings resources in scope of an extended resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCETYPE}} with a real resourcetype. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{RESOURCENAMESPACE}} with a real resourcenamespace.
